news-korea-econ.title: Rubio designates Afghanistan as 'state sponsor of wrongful detention': 'Despicable tactics'
news-korea-econ.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio designated Afghanistan as a state sponsor of wrongful detention, accusing the Taliban of using terrorist tactics against Americans.

news-global-econ.title: Disturbing admissions of serial child molester approved for release spur California lawmakers to act
news-global-econ.description: Convicted child predator who admitted ongoing attraction to girls pleads not guilty to new charge, halting parole as California Republicans push to overhaul elderly parole law.

news-global-econ.title: Male fertility rates crash as doctors reveal health threats: 'Something very wrong'
news-global-econ.description: Male fertility issues spark debate, as studies show conflicting results on sperm counts. Experts reveal the complex reality behind declining birth rates.

news-global-econ.title: Whoops! Ending Nuclear Power May Have Been a Mistake After All, Says EU Chief
news-global-econ.description:
Europe's mad dash to decommission its nuclear power plants was a "strategic mistake", Commission boss Ursula von der Leyen has admitted.
The post Whoops! Ending Nuclear Power May Have Been a Mistake After All, Says EU Chief appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Trump ends Biden’s drug price nightmare — Americans get real relief with TrumpRx
news-global-econ.description: President Trump's healthcare policies protect patient choice and restore trust while addressing ongoing public health challenges effectively.

news-global-econ.title: REPS. FINE, SELF, HARRIS, Enough is enough: We'll block the Senate until the SAVE Act passes
news-global-econ.description: House Republicans threaten to block Senate legislation until Majority Leader John Thune passes the SAVE America Act requiring voter ID and citizenship proof for elections.

news-korea-soc.title: Australian official touts bravery of Iranian women's soccer team as some receive asylum
news-korea-soc.description: An Australian city official lamented to Fox News that the government didn't do more to help the Iranian women's soccer team stay in the country.

news-global-soc.title: Tom Cotton puts Biden on notice while demanding answers on draining of nation’s oil stockpile
news-global-soc.description: A top Senate Republican alleged that former President Joe Biden used the SPR as a political tool, and demanded to know how his energy policy hampered the nation's oil reserves.

news-global-soc.title: Adani Energy raises $500 million bilateral debt from Apollo
news-global-soc.description: Adani Energy secures $500 million in private bonds from Apollo to refinance dollar debt amid shifting funding strategies.

news-global-soc.title: Global banks push back on India’s offshore rupee reporting plan
news-global-soc.description: Banks say reporting requirements could breach client confidentiality and clash with overseas data rules

news-global-soc.title: Asia’s fuel crunch triggers four-day weeks, school closures
news-global-soc.description: Asia faces fuel shortages, prompting governments to implement four-day work weeks and energy-saving measures amid Middle East supply disruptions.
